title: Verify the application does not crash when wifi is turned off and user clicks on Login button
scenario: App does not crash when tapping Login button with Wi-Fi turned off during initial setup flow
steps: 1. Ensure Wi-Fi is turned off on the device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
3. If the Notifications dialog appears, tap Accept.
4. On the License Agreement screen, tap Accept.
5. On the initial setup screens, tap Skip.
6. Tap Continue to proceed past the remaining setup screens.
7. On the Home screen, tap the Login button.
expected: App should not crash. The Login page should be displayed.
